title: Creamy Quinoa Casserole
description: A comforting, creamy casserole made with quinoa and a medley of flavors.
instructions: Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
In a separate saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add 1 cup of daring cheese to the saucepan and stir until melted.
Combine cooked quinoa, melted cheese mixture, and 1/4 cup of milk in the casserole dish.
Transfer the casserole to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with additional daring cheese if desired.
